## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] Manually tested the affected view(s) in a real vault
- [ ] Followed the conventions in [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md)
      (frontmatter is the source of truth, no parallel state in the
      store, services own vault writes, assistant write tools go through
      `AssistantConfirmModal`)
- [ ] Commit message uses Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`,
      `docs:`, `refactor:`, `chore:`)
